user.title: Albert Heijn
user.description: Click submit to open the Albert Heijn login page in your browser. Log in there to connect your account.

login.title: Log in to Albert Heijn
login.description: Complete the login in your browser. This page will update automatically when done.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Albert Heijn
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Click submit to log in again via your browser.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Albert Heijn. Try again later.

abort.login_failed: Login failed or timed out. Please try again.
abort.invalid_auth: Token validation failed. Please try again.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Albert Heijn to verify login.
